queries.question: What Airbus aircrafts have 180 seats and what Boeing aircrafts have the same number of seats?
queries.sql:
SELECT Manufactures.aircraftModel 
FROM Manufactures
WHERE (Manufactures.manufacturers = "Airbus" OR Manufactures.manufacturers = "Boeing") AND Manufactures.numberOfSeats = 180
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?aircraftmodel WHERE {
  ?manufactures a :Manufactures .
  ?manufactures p:aircraftModel ?aircraftmodel .
  ?manufactures p:manufacturers ?manufacturers_w .
  ?manufactures p:manufacturers ?manufacturers_w2 .
  ?manufactures p:numberOfSeats ?numberofseats_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?manufacturers_w) = "Airbus" || STR(?manufacturers_w2) = "Boeing")) && (STR(?numberofseats_w) = "180" || STR(?numberofseats_w) = "180.0")))
}

queries.question: Provide a list of all Airbus aircrafts and also provide a list of Boeing aircrafts with 180 seats.
queries.sql:
SELECT Manufactures.aircraftModel 
FROM Manufactures
WHERE Manufactures.manufacturers = "Airbus" OR Manufactures.manufacturers = "Boeing" AND Manufactures.numberOfSeats = 180
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?aircraftmodel WHERE {
  ?manufactures a :Manufactures .
  ?manufactures p:aircraftModel ?aircraftmodel .
  ?manufactures p:manufacturers ?manufacturers_w .
  ?manufactures p:manufacturers ?manufacturers_w2 .
  ?manufactures p:numberOfSeats ?numberofseats_w .
  FILTER((STR(?manufacturers_w) = "Airbus" || (STR(?manufacturers_w2) = "Boeing" && (STR(?numberofseats_w) = "180" || STR(?numberofseats_w) = "180.0"))))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me Airbus aircrafts and Boeing aircrafts with 180 seats.
